name: Magma Domain
description: Magma Domain is an Athasian paraelemental domain for the Elemental Cleric. At 3rd level it grants always-prepared domain spells, a domain-specific Elemental Channeling option, and a 3rd-level feature. It also grants a 6th-level enhancement and a 17th-level capstone.

effects.name: Magma Domain Training
effects.description: Magma Domain features apply according to subclass progression.
